risk.desc: Potential structural weakness due to cutaway design.
risk.mit: Use reinforced materials and design for additional support.

risk.desc: Risk of misalignment during assembly due to loose tolerances.
risk.mit: Implement tighter manufacturing tolerances and quality control.

risk.desc: Possibility of damage to internal components during removal.
risk.mit: Ensure smooth operation of slide rail and use protective covers.

risk.desc: Risk of incorrect mating due to unlabeled connectors.
risk.mit: Label all connectors and provide clear assembly instructions.

risk.desc: Potential for thermal stress due to poor thermal management.
risk.mit: Improve thermal insulation and cooling systems.

generated_parts.label: Stage 1 Bell Nozzle Display Shell
generated_parts.spec: Non-functional bell_nozzle_shell display mock with cutaway_window, bolt_circle_dummy, throat label, removable engine_display_cartridge interface

requirements: Non-functional bell_nozzle_shell display mock with cutaway_window, bolt_circle_dummy, throat label, removable engine_display_cartridge interface
Removable engine display cartridge: combustion chamber dummy, bell nozzle shell, turbopump dummy in cutaway bay (non-functional)
Cable harness visibility: routed through visible raceways or protected channels
Access represented by geometry: hatch, pocket, channel, fastener pattern, slot, window, or removable cover
Every cable exit shows strain relief geometry and routing respects a stated minimum bend radius
Connectors are reachable without disassembling structure, have finger/tool clearance, and mention keying or labeling to prevent mis-mating
Tank, interstage, avionics, recovery, and engine-display modules are labeled educational/display-only
Cutaway shows tank dummies, interstage datum, avionics bay, recovery bay, and removable engine display cartridge
Risk/verification focuses on mockup structure, inspection, interfaces, and unsafe overclaiming
Interstage and module joints show locating datums, bolt-circle dummies, and alignment keys so the mock stack assembles repeatably for review

verify.rule: cad_brief.mass_est_g
All required features present
Each feature in part_tree has corresponding geometry_ops
Interfaces with adjacent modules are reciprocal
Visible locking evidence for critical joints

risk.desc: Potential misalignment during assembly due to lack of precise alignment features.
risk.mit: Implement precise alignment pins or dowels for mating interfaces.

risk.desc: Risk of damage to the cutaway window during handling.
risk.mit: Use protective covers or padding during transportation and storage.

risk.desc: Insufficient strain relief for cables exiting the engine display cartridge interface.
risk.mit: Add strain relief clamps and ensure proper routing with adequate bend radius.

risk.desc: Potential confusion with actual propulsion components due to realistic appearance.
risk.mit: Clearly label all non-functional components as educational displays.

risk.desc: Risk of thermal stress on CFRP layup due to proximity to heat sources.
risk.mit: Increase insulation or use thermally stable materials near heat sources.
